title: Prompt-injection SSRF in Flowise POST API Chain (postCore.ts)
description: The Flowise POST API Chain (packages/components/nodes/chains/ApiChain/postCore.ts) builds an outbound HTTP request from an LLM response. In _call(), apiRequestChain.predict() returns a JSON body whose 'url' field is taken verbatim and passed to secureFetch(url, ...). Because the API documentation used to drive the LLM is attacker-influenced (prompt injection), the attacker can make the LLM emit any URL, including http://host.docker.internal, http://169.254.169.254, or other internal hosts. At flowise@3.0.13 secureFetch only enforces the deny list when the HTTP_DENY_LIST environment variable is explicitly configured, so in the default deployment no SSRF protection applies and the server fetches the attacker-chosen internal endpoint.
